Your AI should do the work,
not just describe it.

Most AI tools stop at generating text. They can't read your calendar, send a Slack message, query your database, or run a report. G4 OS can — and does.

Sources & Connections

Everything your business runs on — connected.

Tens of native integrations out of the box — Google Workspace, Slack, CRMs, ad platforms, databases. The agent reads from them, acts on them, and combines data across all of them in a single request.

Not in the list? Connect any MCP server or REST API in minutes.

Slack

Many more
Supports any MCP server or REST API — if it has an API, G4 OS can connect to it. No code, no config files.
AI Session

Your tools. One conversation.

G4 OS connects to your live data and acts across all your tools in a single session. Ask questions, delegate tasks, build reports — across every source, simultaneously.

Each action is transparent: you see exactly what the agent pulled, from where, and why.

Automations

Your business runs even when you don't.

Build routines once, run forever. Morning briefs, daily checkpoints, Slack digests, performance alerts — configured with natural language, scheduled automatically.

The agent handles the repetitive. You handle the important.

Why G4 OS

Built different, by design.

Not a chatbot. Not a wrapper. A true operating layer for your business.

Everything connected

35+ native integrations plus any MCP server or REST API. Your entire business stack, speaking one language.

Runs on its own

Scheduled routines execute automatically. Morning briefs, daily checkpoints, weekly reports. Set once, run forever.

Control from anywhere

Browser remote sharing, Telegram integration, API webhooks. Your operating system follows you everywhere.

Control from anywhere

Your AI, always in reach.

G4 OS extends beyond the desktop. Control sessions from a browser, send commands from Telegram, or integrate directly via API — your operating system is always on.

Remote Browser
Share a session link — view or collaborate from any device in real time
Telegram Integration
Send commands, receive briefings, and get alerts through your phone
API & Webhooks
Trigger sessions and workflows programmatically from any external system
Under the hood

Built for serious work.

G4 OS automatically selects the best model for each task — balancing capability, speed, and cost.

Scheduled Routines

Natural language automation. Morning briefs, daily checkpoints, weekly reports — set up once, run forever.

Connect everything

35+ native sources plus any MCP server or REST API. If it has an interface, G4 OS can talk to it — and act on it.

Persistent Memory

Cross-session context that grows over time. Contacts, preferences, project history — always available, never repeated.

Best-Model Selection

Automatically picks the right AI model for each task. Claude, Gemini, and others — working together seamlessly behind the scenes.

Never lose context

RLM and LCM technology keeps full context across long sessions. Conversations are compressed intelligently — nothing is ever lost, no matter how complex the task.

Parallel Agents

Spawn multiple agents running simultaneously on independent tasks. Delegate, run in parallel, and aggregate results in a single session.
